blind_holo.classification_note: Holo governor processed all five Rule 5 conditions and full OFAC clearance correctly. Surfaced BEC-adjacent structure and cross-reference between GTC principal record and AP-VOB contact identity. Converged to ALLOW with HIGH confidence.
blind_holo.dispositive_control: Rule 5 — all four assigned-receivables conditions satisfied (LEG-2026-0219, AP-VOB-2026-0412, TAX-2026-0281, TRY-2026-0190) combined with Rule 4 GTC clearance (GTC-2026-0318)

benchmark_note: All models returned correct ALLOW. No false-positive failure observed. Packet is valid and clean. Retained as calibration control for FP_COMPLIANCE_OVER_ESCALATION failure class.
publishable_reason: No solo model failed. Publishing as a precision delta would misrepresent the outcome.
path_to_publishable: Structural variants with buried clearance evidence, more prominent hold language, or multiple stacked OFAC flags may cause solo escalation on the same failure class. Current packet is too well-resolved for a gap to emerge.
